desc:
Overseers log – #7 The log is inside Camp Venture in the Mire region of the map. You will need to get past a terminal to enter the area or pick the lock. The password is in the basement of one of the smaller buildings outside of the main camp. Find a small note showing Command Center Password in the basement.
Grid H5 (X: 3163.8, Y: 1772.6)
Submitted By MrCrazy
